actions.name: 预付单号_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 预付单号_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT yfhk.sid,
       yfhk.wxfp,
       yfhk.cght,
       yfhk.fkje,
       yfhk.htje,
       yfhk.fkbz,
       yfhk.fkrq,
       yfhk.jsrm,
       yfhk.sccj,
       yfhk.yhzh,
       yfhk.khh,
       yfhk.gcmc1,
       yfhk.rxfs,
       yfhk.yfdh,
       yfhk.chrq,
       yfhk.fkdq
FROM yfhk 
WHERE (yfhk.sfqd<>"是") 
  AND ((:qxjb1=2) 
  OR ((:qxjb1 =0) 
  AND (yfhk.sys_owner=:c_user)) 
  OR ((:qxjb1 =1) 
  AND (yfhk.sys_path LIKE :c_depart))) 
ORDER BY yfhk.sid ASC

actions.name: 生产厂家_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 生产厂家_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT newcwcs.company_name,
       newcwcs.sid,
       newcwcs.province,
       newcwcs.city,
       newcwcs.bank,
       newcwcs.zh,
       newcwcs.shui,
       newcwcs.phone,
       newcwcs.fhsh
FROM newcwcs 

ORDER BY newcwcs.company_name ASC

FROM newcwcs 
WHERE (newcwcs.company_name=:company_name) 
ORDER BY newcwcs.sid DESC LIMIT 1

fields.caption: 银行名称
fields.output: 采购付款.我方银行名称

actions.expression:
SELECT fkyh.sid,
       fkyh.custId,
       fkyh.wfyhmc,
       fkyh.corpCode,
       fkyh.fkdq,
       fkyh.subaAccountSerial
FROM fkyh 
WHERE (fkyh.wstt=[采购付款.我司抬头]) 
  AND (fkyh.fkdq=[采购付款.付款地区]) 
  AND (fkyh.payAcc=:payAcc) 
ORDER BY fkyh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT gchk.wfyhzh,
       gchk.wfyhmc,
       gchk.custId,
       gchk.corpCode,
       gchk.subaAccountSerial
FROM gchk 
WHERE gchk.wfyhmc=[采购付款.我方银行名称] 
GROUP BY gchk.wfyhzh,gchk.wfyhmc,gchk.custId ,gchk.corpCode,gchk.subaAccountSerial LIMIT 1

actions.name: 采购合同_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 采购合同_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT gchksheet.sid,gchksheet.cght,gchksheet.fphm ,gchksheet.yfje1 
FROM gchk,gchksheet 
WHERE (gchk.sid=gchksheet.pid) 
  AND (gchksheet.cght=[采购付款.采购合同]) 
  AND (gchksheet.yfje1>0) 
ORDER BY gchksheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT gcdjsheet.sid,
       gcdjsheet.fphm,
       gcdjsheet.syrq,
       gcdjsheet.sydje,
       gcdjsheet.cphh,
       gcdjsheet.zwpm,

  AND (yfhk.yfdh=[采购付款.预付单号]) 
  AND (gcdjsheet.sfdr<>"是") 
ORDER BY gcdjsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT gcdjsheet.sid,
       gcdjsheet.fphm,
       gcdjsheet.cphh,
       gcdjsheet.zwpm,
       gcdjsheet.dj,
       gcdjsheet.dw,
       gcdjsheet.bz1,
       gcdjsheet.xs,
       gcdjsheet.zsl,
       gcdjsheet.gcmc,
       gcdjsheet.rxfs,
       gcdjsheet.rxr,
       gcdjsheet.sjhm,
       gcdjsheet.sybz,
       gcdjsheet.cght
FROM yfhk,gcdjsheet 
WHERE (yfhk.sid=gcdjsheet.pid) 
  AND (yfhk.sid=:sid) 
  AND (gcdjsheet.sfdr<>"是") 
ORDER BY gcdjsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应的生产厂家预付货款
actions.caption: 对应的生产厂家预付货款
actions.expression:
SELECT yfhk.sid 
FROM yfhk 
WHERE (yfhk.sccj=:sccj) 
  AND (yfhk.sfjq<>"是") 
ORDER BY yfhk.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应的出货工厂预付货款
actions.caption: 对应的出货工厂预付货款
actions.expression:
SELECT yfhk.sid 
FROM yfhk 
WHERE (yfhk.gcmc1=[采购付款.出货工厂]) 
  AND (yfhk.sfjq<>"是") 
ORDER BY yfhk.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应的采购合同预付
actions.caption: 对应的采购合同预付
actions.expression:
SELECT yfhk.sid 
FROM yfhk 
WHERE (yfhk.cght=[采购付款.采购合同]) 
  AND (yfhk.sfjq<>"是") 
ORDER BY yfhk.sid ASC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 对应的详情预付
actions.caption: 对应的详情预付
actions.expression:
SELECT yfhk.sid 
FROM yfhk 
WHERE (yfhk.cght=[采购付款.采购合同]) 
  AND (yfhk.sfjq<>"是") 
ORDER BY yfhk.sid ASC

actions.caption: 对应的开票通知
actions.expression:
SELECT kaiptz.sid 
FROM kaiptz,kaiptzxq 
WHERE (kaiptz.sid=kaiptzxq.pid) 
  AND (kaiptzxq.kpxh=[采购付款.开票序号]) 
ORDER BY kaiptz.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应采购合同
actions.caption: 对应采购合同
actions.expression:
SELECT cght.sid 
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=:hthm) 
ORDER BY cght.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-不含税价
actions.caption: 计算-不含税价
actions.expression: [采购付款.发票金额]/(1+[采购付款.增值税率]/100)

actions.name: 计算-税    额
actions.caption: 计算-税    额
actions.expression: [采购付款.发票金额]-[采购付款.不含税价]

actions.name: 计算-付款合计
actions.caption: 计算-付款合计
actions.expression: [采购付款.付款详情.付款金额]

actions.name: 计算-应付合计
actions.caption: 计算-应付合计
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.应付金额]

actions.name: 计算-付款差额
actions.caption: 计算-付款差额
actions.expression: [采购付款.合同金额]-[采购付款.付款合计]-[采购付款.赔款]

actions.name: 计算-合同金额$
actions.caption: 计算-合同金额$
actions.expression: [采购付款.合同金额]/[采购付款.银行汇率]

actions.name: 计算-银行金额
actions.caption: 计算-银行金额
actions.expression: [采购付款.付款金额]*100

actions.name: 计算-应付金额
actions.caption: 计算-应付金额
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.单  价]*[采购付款.详细用途.总数量]
actions.output: 采购付款.详细用途.应付金额

actions.name: 计算-未付金额
actions.caption: 计算-未付金额
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.应付金额]-[采购付款.详细用途.支付金额]
actions.output: 采购付款.详细用途.未付金额

actions.name: 计算-总数量
actions.caption: 计算-总数量
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.总数量]

actions.name: 计算-箱数合计
actions.caption: 计算-箱数合计
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.箱  数]

actions.name: 计算-扣款金额
actions.caption: 计算-扣款金额
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.扣款金额]

actions.name: 计算-预付金额
actions.caption: 计算-预付金额
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.预付金额]

actions.name: 计算-提前审请合计
actions.caption: 计算-提前审请合计
actions.expression: [采购付款.详细用途.提前审请]
actions.output: 采购付款.提前审请合计

SELECT DISTINCT(cght.hthm)
FROM cght
ORDER BY cght.hthm ASC

SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率")

FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.ryxm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.ryxm ASC
